task_objective: Design and implement a data profiling system native to Ibis that treats profiling as a query planning problem.
design_decisions: Separated planning from execution using a QueryPlanner and ExecutionEngine.
Used a MetricRegistry to allow for extensible, declarative metric definitions.
Implemented a single-pass global aggregation strategy for column statistics.
Ensured backend pushdown by building pure Ibis expression graphs.
Enforced TDD by creating corresponding tests for every implementation file.
results: Successfully implemented the core profiling engine with 99% test coverage. The system can profile multi-million row datasets by pushing all computations to the backend with minimal query counts.
